title: stelis praemorsa
intro: Stelis praemorsa is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis praemorsa include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Stelis praemorsa can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
